# Angkor Thom, The Great City
byDr. Melody Rod-ari  ...    East face of the Baphuon, Angkor Thom, Siem Reap, Cambodia (photo: LBM1948, CC BY-SA 4.0)  With each successive king came the building of a new royal city such as Angkor Thom. The name, Angkor Thom, translated from theKhmerlanguagemeans “Great Kingdom,” alluding to the grand ambitions of its patron:King Jayavarman VII.
